tools.pipeGradientDesc: Design pipe gradients with hydraulic calculations
tools.pointCloudImportDesc: Import, classify, and process 3D point cloud data

voiceDictation.notSupported: Voice input not supported in this browser

pwa.installDescription: Install for offline field work, faster load, and push notifications.
pwa.installDescriptionIOS: Add METARDU to your Home Screen for offline field use.
pwa.safariStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar
pwa.safariStep2: Scroll and tap Add to Home Screen
pwa.safariStep3: Tap Add — METARDU will appear on your Home Screen and work offline.

photoCapture.emptyState: Optional — capture up to {count} beacon photos with embedded GPS.
photoCapture.exifNotSupported: EXIF parsing not supported in this browser — photos will save without GPS metadata.
photoCapture.unsupportedFormat: "{name}" is not a supported image format

fieldMode.autoActivatedDesc: High ambient light detected. Switched to sunlight-readable mode.
fieldMode.darkRestoredDesc: Ambient light dropped. Switched back to dark mode.
fieldMode.fieldEnabledDesc: Optimized for sunlight readability with high contrast and large touch targets.
fieldMode.darkEnabledDesc: Switched back to standard dark mode.
fieldMode.sensorNotSupported: Light sensor not available on this device
